questions.statement:
<p>Directions: In the following items, a sentence is given with a blank space that is required to be filled with a phrasal verb. Select the most appropriate response from the options provided and mark your response accordingly.</p>

<p>She had to ___ the children while their parents were away.</p>

<p><strong>Directions: In the following question, four alternatives are given for the idiom/phrase underlined in the sentence. Choose the alternative which best expresses the meaning of the idiom/phrase.</strong></p>

<p>The popular understanding of secularism in India has undergone <u>a sea change</u>.</p>
options: a change that can never be happened&nbsp; /

questions.statement:
<p>Select the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom.</p>

<p>A man of straw&nbsp;</p>

<p style=""><span style="font-weight: 700;">Find the best one-word substitution for the below description.</span></p>

<p>The profession of teaching or the approach or style of teaching</p>

<p><strong>Choose the correct opposites of the given words.</strong></p>

<p>Bucolic</p>

<p><strong>Direction: In the following questions, choose the word opposite in meaning to the given word.</strong></p>

<p>Revival</p>

<p>Select the most appropriate option to fill in the blank.</p>

<p>I ________ to the hope that he&rsquo;s still alive.</p>

<p>Choose the most appropriate meaning of the given idiom.</p>

<p>Behind the times&nbsp;</p>
options: To do something without making any progress /

questions.statement:
<p>Choose the word that can substitute the given sentence.</p>

<p>Dress with medals, ribbons worn at official ceremonies</p>

<p>Select the most appropriate word to fill in the blank.</p>

<p>The markets experienced a ____ at the news of the sale.&nbsp;</p>
